note: Custom directory layout for this machine. The env-var files in this folder reference these paths. Keep in sync if the layout changes on the source machine (TITAN).

drives.E: OneDrive consumer (E:\OneDrive) - holds synced PowerShell profile + modules

toolchain.purpose: All language toolchain caches and package stores

portableApps.purpose: WinGet-installed portable tools (path is appended to $env:Path per-package)
portableApps.note: Per-tool subdirs are created by winget and have unstable names (PackageId_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe). On a new system, re-install the same winget packages and the subdirs will be re-created; the env-var JSON will need the new paths substituted if WinGet assigns different subdir names.

syncedConfig.purpose: Profile + PowerShell modules synced via OneDrive
syncedConfig.note: This directory's PowerShell content is generated by powershell/Install-Profile.ps1. Re-run Install-Profile.ps1 on a new system to regenerate the loader; restore Modules/ and Scripts/ via OneDrive sync or backup.
